'''Delund''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] stationed on the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']] who later joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> aboard the [[Imperial II-class frigate|''Imperial II''-class frigate]]<ref name="Darklighter1">[[Empire 8|''Empire'' 8]]</ref> [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']], Delund secretly harbored rebel sympathies, and was a member of a cell of like-minded individuals, including the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]] [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]].<ref name="Darklighter2" />

During a meeting between four cell members, including Delund, Darklighter, and [[Peate Kurin]], the cell was discovered by [[Second mate/Legends|second mate]]<ref name="Darklighter1" /> [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]], forcing the rebels to put their [[Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic/Legends|plan of defection]] into action. Sabotaging the ''Rand Ecliptic''{{'s}} systems and donning the [[Life support/Legends|life support]] [[Flight suit/Legends|suits]] of the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate's]] [[TIE pilot]]s, the four defectors escaped in [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], heading galactic north to regroup and search for a haven at which to resupply.<ref name="Darklighter2" />

Although Delund identified a potential base, it was discovered to be uninhabitable, merely a dead rock.<ref name="Darklighter2" /> Hours after their mutiny on the ''Rand Ecliptic'', with dwindling life support and no sign of sanctuary, Darklighter ordered a return to the frigate to obtain replacement fuel and oxygen tanks. Surprised to find the starship non-hostile and lacking the rest of its TIE complement, the defectors discovered that the ''Rand Ecliptic'' had been commandeered by three other rebel cells present on the ship, including one led by Klivian, who had taken command of the vessel.<ref name="Darklighter3" />

The mutineers would join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], contributing ships and personnel to the cause. Delund, along with fellow mutineers Darklighter, Klivian, and Kurin, flew TIE Fighters modified with [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]], [[Astromech socket/Legends|astromech sockets]], and [[Alliance Starbird]] insignia as the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit the [[Ecliptic Evaders]].<ref name="Hasbro" /> Sent by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] to [[Strike at an Incom Corporation facility|steal]] several [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] from an [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] assembly facility, Delund and his unit perform a diversionary attack on an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] station overseeing the facility, drawing away the ISB's TIE [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] before ejecting and being shuttled to the facility in an [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|Alliance transport]]. Although Kurin was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and Klivian wounded in the process, the Delund and the other [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] sucessfully recovered the X-wings, flying them back to the ''Rand Ecliptic'', awaiting them in orbit.<ref name="Darklighter3" />
